attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, use Config tool.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (triggers) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/triggers.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- skill-creator: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
- libnn-wiki-writer: Internal style guide for writing docs/wiki/ pages during /libnn-optimizer learn phase. Not a standalone skill -- read by the optimize agent.
- mlir-transform-writer: Write MLIR transform dialect scripts that directly control IR lowering - tiling, fusion, vectorization, bufferization, GPU thread mapping, shared memory promotion, and more. Use this skill whenever someone asks to generate, write, or modify a transform dialect script, transform library, codegen strategy, or tuning spec in MLIR. Also trigger when the request involves composing IR transformations for linalg ops, controlling IREE codegen pipelines via transform dialect, or replacing annotation-only configs with full transform strategies. Covers both upstream MLIR transform ops and IREE-specific extensions.
- iree-optimizer: Agentic per-dispatch tile-size tuner for IREE CPU codegen on RISC-V. Keeps IREE's chosen pipeline (CPUDoubleTilingExpert / CPUConvTileAndDecomposeExpert / CPUBufferOpsTileAndVectorize) and only overrides the root linalg op's lowering_config<tile_sizes = [...]>. Each round reads the best-so-far RISC-V assembly (LMUL, VLmax, register spills) to ground the next tile-size proposal; pre-compile divisibility gate ensures tiles divide their parent extents (no tail loop); a post-compile check of the IR after iree-codegen-generic-vectorization confirms no tail/masked main path. Compiles via iree_tuner.py, benchmarks on FPGA, iterates. Use whenever the user mentions tuning IREE dispatch tile sizes, agentic tile search, or wants to replace GA-based tile-size search with LLM-driven search. Trigger on "iree optimize", "optimize dispatch", "tile tune", or references to dispatch .mlir files for performance tuning.
- libnn-optimizer: Autonomous optimization workflow for libnn RISC-V neural network library functions
in the agentic_libnn_opt project. Use this skill when the user wants to optimize a
libnn function for FPGA performance, run the libnn optimization loop, validate the
optimization config, parse FPGA hardware features, extract shapes from perf test files,
or manage the optimization state machine. Trigger when: user mentions "optimize",
"libnn", "FPGA perf", "optimization loop", "validate config",
"phase gather/baseline/iterate/evaluate", "perf test", or references opt/config.toml,
opt/state.json, or any libnn function optimization task.
- cc-log: Lightweight system log to record all Claude Code behavior (tool use, subagent creation, compaction, permissions, session lifecycle) for analysis. Use when the user wants to enable/disable behavior logging, analyze Claude Code session logs, list saved logs, or understand Claude Code's tool usage patterns. Trigger on: "cc-log", "behavior log", "system log", "record behavior", "log enable", "log disable", "analyze log".
- ralph-loop:ralph-loop: Start Ralph Loop in current session
- ralph-loop:help: Explain Ralph Loop plugin and available commands
- ralph-loop:cancel-ralph: Cancel active Ralph Loop
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

file.content:
SUBDIRS := hello dhrystone cpp syscall hvm_test rvv lm_test acervv_basic

.PHONY: all $(SUBDIRS)

all: $(SUBDIRS)

$(SUBDIRS):
	$(MAKE) -C $@

clean: $(addprefix clean-,$(SUBDIRS))
	@echo "Cleaning test status files..."
	@rm -f */.test_passed */.test_failed

clean-%:
	$(MAKE) -C $* clean
	@rm -f $*/.test_passed $*/.test_failed

run: $(addprefix run-,$(SUBDIRS))
	@echo "========================================="
	@echo "Test Results Summary:"
	@echo "========================================="
	@failed=0; \
	for dir in $(SUBDIRS); do \
		if [ -f "$$dir/.test_passed" ]; then \
			echo "✓ $$dir: PASSED"; \
		elif [ -f "$$dir/.test_failed" ]; then \
			echo "✗ $$dir: FAILED"; \
			failed=$$((failed + 1)); \
		else \
			echo "? $$dir: UNKNOWN"; \
			failed=$$((failed + 1)); \
		fi; \
	done; \
	echo "=========================================" ; \
	if [ $$failed -eq 0 ]; then \
		echo "All tests PASSED!"; \
	else \
		echo "$$failed test(s) FAILED!"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi

run-%:
	@echo "Running test: $*"
	@rm -f $*/.test_passed $*/.test_failed
	@if $(MAKE) -C $* run; then \
		touch $*/.test_passed; \
		echo "✓ $*: PASSED"; \
	else \
		touch $*/.test_failed; \
		echo "✗ $*: FAILED"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi

-include ../Make.var

CC:=$(TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX)gcc
OBJDUMP:=$(TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX)objdump
CFLAGS:= -march=rv$(XLEN)gc -O1

all: hello hello.dump

hello: main.c
	$(CC) $^ -o $@ $(VSIM_FILES) $(CFLAGS) $(VSIM_FLAGS) $(VSIM_OPTIMIZE)

hello.dump: hello
	$(OBJDUMP) $^ -d > $@

clean:
	- rm -f hello *.o hello.dump

.PHONY: clean all

run: hello
	$(SIMULATOR_BIN) $^

file.content:
# vsim-demo

This project contains multiple RISC-V demo programs that can be compiled and run using a AndesCycle simulator (e.g. `sim_d45`) and Andes toolchain. It supports demos written in both C and C++.

```

vsim-demo/
├── Makefile          # Top-level makefile
├── libgloss.c        # Support library
├── handler.c         # Exception handler
├── crt0.S            # Startup code
├── trap.S            # Trap handling
├── syscall.h         # system call handling via HTIF
├── htif.h            # system call handling via HTIF
├── core_v5.h         # Andes register map
├── hello/            # Hello world demo
├── dhrystone/        # Dhrystone benchmark demo
├── syscall/          # Test system calls via htif
├── acervv_basic/     # Test ACERVV custom instruction
├── rvv/              # Test RISC-V Vector extension
└── cpp/              # C++ demo

````

## 🔧 Prerequisites

- Andes RISC-V toolchain (e.g., `riscv32-elf-gcc`)
- A working AndesCycle simulator binary (e.g., `sim_d45`, `sim_ax45mpv_premium`...)

## 🔧 Configuration

Edit the **Make.var** to specify your toolchain, copilot and simulator path

```make
XLEN := 32
TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX := riscv$(XLEN)-elf-
SIMULATOR_BIN := ~/vsim/build/sim_d45
COPILOT ?= copilot
````

These variables configure the toolchain prefix and simulator path. You can switch to RV64 by setting `XLEN := 64`.

## 🛠 Building and Running All Demos

```bash
make
```

This builds all subprojects listed in `SUBDIRS := ` in Makefile.

## 🧪 Running a Demo

To compile a specific demo:

```bash
make hello
```

To run a specific demo:

```bash
make run-hello
```

This will compile the demo (if needed) and invoke the simulator on the generated binary.

Or you can also go to the directory and make

```bash
cd hello
make
```

5	 * This file defines the reset/nmi/trap handlers, the reset initialization code
6	 * and the trap entry table for Vectored-PLIC.

10	 * For sample production version of start.S, please find it in Andes Startup
11	 * demos.
12	 */

14	#include "core_v5.h"
15	
16		.section .text
17		.align 6
18	
19	.global m_trap_entry
20	m_trap_entry:
21		addi sp, sp, -40*REGBYTES
22	
23		/* Save caller registers */
24		STORE x0, 0*REGBYTES(sp)
25		STORE x1, 1*REGBYTES(sp)
26		STORE x3, 3*REGBYTES(sp)
27		STORE x4, 4*REGBYTES(sp)
28		STORE x5, 5*REGBYTES(sp)
29		STORE x6, 6*REGBYTES(sp)
30		STORE x7, 7*REGBYTES(sp)
31		STORE x8, 8*REGBYTES(sp)
32		STORE x9, 9*REGBYTES(sp)
33		STORE x10, 10*REGBYTES(sp)
34		STORE x11, 11*REGBYTES(sp)
35		STORE x12, 12*REGBYTES(sp)
36		STORE x13, 13*REGBYTES(sp)
37		STORE x14, 14*REGBYTES(sp)
38		STORE x15, 15*REGBYTES(sp)
39	#ifndef __riscv_32e
40		STORE x16, 16*REGBYTES(sp)
41		STORE x17, 17*REGBYTES(sp)
42		STORE x18, 18*REGBYTES(sp)
43		STORE x19, 19*REGBYTES(sp)
44		STORE x20, 20*REGBYTES(sp)
45		STORE x21, 21*REGBYTES(sp)
46		STORE x22, 22*REGBYTES(sp)
47		STORE x23, 23*REGBYTES(sp)
48		STORE x24, 24*REGBYTES(sp)
49		STORE x25, 25*REGBYTES(sp)
50		STORE x26, 26*REGBYTES(sp)
51		STORE x27, 27*REGBYTES(sp)
52		STORE x28, 28*REGBYTES(sp)
53		STORE x29, 29*REGBYTES(sp)
54		STORE x30, 30*REGBYTES(sp)
55		STORE x31, 31*REGBYTES(sp)
56	#endif
57	
58		/* Save mstatus and mepc */
59		csrr t0, mepc
60		csrr t1, mstatus
61		csrr t2, mxstatus
62	
63		STORE t0, 32*REGBYTES(sp)
64		STORE t1, 33*REGBYTES(sp)
65		STORE t2, 34*REGBYTES(sp)

68		csrr a0, mcause

72		/* Disable interrupt */

74	
75		/* Restore mstatus and mepc */

77		LOAD t1, 33*REGBYTES(sp)
78		LOAD t2, 34*REGBYTES(sp)

80		csrw mepc, t0

83

file.content:
/*
 * Copyright (c) 2017 Andes Technology Corporation
 * All rights reserved.
 *
 * This file defines the reset/nmi/trap handlers, the reset initialization code
 * and the trap entry table for Vectored-PLIC.
 *
 * Please note that the code in this file is to facilitate AndesCore processor
 * verification and it is NOT a goal for this code to be used in production.
 * For sample production version of start.S, please find it in Andes Startup
 * demos.
 */

#include "core_v5.h"

	.section .text
	.align 6

.global m_trap_entry
m_trap_entry:
	addi sp, sp, -40*REGBYTES

	/* Save caller registers */
	STORE x0, 0*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x1, 1*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x3, 3*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x4, 4*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x5, 5*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x6, 6*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x7, 7*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x8, 8*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x9, 9*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x10, 10*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x11, 11*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x12, 12*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x13, 13*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x14, 14*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x15, 15*REGBYTES(sp)
#ifndef __riscv_32e
	STORE x16, 16*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x17, 17*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x18, 18*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x19, 19*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x20, 20*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x21, 21*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x22, 22*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x23, 23*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x24, 24*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x25, 25*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x26, 26*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x27, 27*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x28, 28*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x29, 29*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x30, 30*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE x31, 31*REGBYTES(sp)
#endif

	/* Save mstatus and mepc */
	csrr t0, mepc
	csrr t1, mstatus
	csrr t2, mxstatus

	STORE t0, 32*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE t1, 33*REGBYTES(sp)
	STORE t2, 34*REGBYTES(sp)

	/* Call trap handler */
	csrr a0, mcause
	mv   a1, sp
	call handle_trap

	/* Disable interrupt */
	csrrci a5, mstatus, MSTATUS_MIE

	/* Restore mstatus and mepc */
	LOAD t0, 32*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD t1, 33*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD t2, 34*REGBYTES(sp)

	csrw mepc, t0
	csrw mstatus, t1
	csrw mxstatus, t2

	/* Restore caller registers */
	LOAD x0, 0*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x1, 1*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x3, 3*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x4, 4*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x5, 5*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x6, 6*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x7, 7*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x8, 8*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x9, 9*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x10, 10*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x11, 11*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x12, 12*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x13, 13*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x14, 14*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x15, 15*REGBYTES(sp)
#ifndef __riscv_32e
	LOAD x16, 16*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x17, 17*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x18, 18*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x19, 19*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x20, 20*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x21, 21*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x22, 22*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x23, 23*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x24, 24*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x25, 25*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x26, 26*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x27, 27*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x28, 28*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x29, 29*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x30, 30*REGBYTES(sp)
	LOAD x31, 31*REGBYTES(sp)
#endif

	addi sp, sp, 40*REGBYTES
	mret

#=========================================================================
# crt0.S : Entry point for RISC-V user programs
#=========================================================================

#ifndef CRT0_MULTIPLE_HARTS
#define CRT0_MULTIPLE_HARTS 0
#endif

#define mcache_ctl 0x7ca
#define mmisc_ctl 0x7d0

  .text
  .global _start
  .type   _start, @function
_start:
  # Enable icache
  csrsi   mcache_ctl, 0x1

#ifdef ENABLE_DCACHE_COHERENCE
  # Enable dcache coherence management
  li      a0, 1 << 19
  csrs    mcache_ctl, a0
1:
  csrr    a0, mcache_ctl
#if __nds_v5
  bbc     a0, 20, 1b
#else
  srli    a1, a0, 20
  andi    a1, a1, 1
  beqz    a1, 1b
#endif
#endif

  # Enable d-cache and hardware prefetch
  ori     a0, a0, 0x703
  csrw    mcache_ctl, a0

  .weak   _stack
  # Initialize stack pointer (if defined)
  lla     a0, _stack
  beqz    a0, 1f
  mv      sp, a0

#if CRT0_MULTIPLE_HARTS
  csrr    a0, mhartid
  slli    a0, a0, 12
  sub     sp, sp, a0
#endif

  # Initialize global pointer
.option push
.option norelax
1:lla gp, __global_pointer$
.option pop

#ifdef __nds_v5
  csrr    a0, mmsc_cfg
  bbc     a0, 3, 1f
  la      a1, _ITB_BASE_
  csrrw   x0, uitb, a1
1:
#if __riscv_xlen >= 64
  bbc     a0, 52, 1f
#else
  bbc     a0, 31, 1f
  csrr    a0, mmsc_cfg2
  bbc     a0, 20, 1f
#endif
  csrr    a0, mrvarch_cfg
  bbc     a0, 31, 1f
  la      a0, __jvt_base$
  csrw    jvt, a0
#endif
1:

  # Set mstatus.fs to 1 (initial)
  li      a0, (1 << 13)
  csrs    mstatus, a0

  # Set mstatus.vs to 1 (initial)
  li      a0, (1 << 10)
  csrs    mstatus, a0

  # Enable unaligned memory access (mmisc_ctl.UNA)
  li      a0, (1 << 6)
  csrs    mmisc_ctl, a0

#if CRT0_MULTIPLE_HARTS
  csrr    a0, mhartid
  beqz    a0, .Lclear_bss

  li      a1, 0xa55a
.Lother_hart_wait_loop:
  ld      a0, other_hart_boot_flag
  bne     a0, a1, .Lother_hart_wait_loop
  j       .Lmain
#else
  csrr    a0, mhartid
  beqz    a0, .Lclear_bss
  li      a0, 0x01234571
  li      a1, 0xe0080000
  sw      a0, 0(a1)
1:
  j       1b
#endif

  # Clear the bss segment
.Lclear_bss:
  la      a0, _edata
  la      a2, _end
  sub     a2, a2, a0
  li      a1, 0
  call    memset


#if CRT0_MULTIPLE_HARTS
  li      a0, 0xa55a
  lla     a1, other_hart_boot_flag
  sd      a0, 0(a1)
  fence
#endif

  call init_mtvec

.Lmain:
  li      a0, 0
  li      a1, 0
  li      a2, 0
  call    main

  call    _exit

.Lloop:
  j       .Lloop

  .size   _start, .-_start

#if CRT0_MULTIPLE_HARTS
  .data
  .p2align 3
  .global other_hart_boot_flag
  .type   other_hart_boot_flag, @object
other_hart_boot_flag:
  .8byte 0
  .size other_hart_boot_flag, . - other_hart_boot_flag
#endif

1	#ifndef HTIF_H
2	#define HTIF_H
3	
4	#include <stddef.h>
5	#include <stdint.h>
6	
7	// L1 Cache Control Commands
8	#define CCTL_L1D_WBINVAL_ALL 6
9	#define CCTL_L1D_WB_ALL      7
10	#define CCTL_L1D_INVAL_ALL   23
11	
12	// L2 Cache Control and Status Constants
13	#define CCTL_L2_WBINVAL_ALL  0x12
14	#define CCTL_L2_ST_RUNNING   1
15	#define CCTL_ST_MASK         0xF
16	
17	// L2 Cache Control Register Addresses
18	#define L2C_REG_CTL          0xe0500008
19	#define L2C_REG_CCTL         0xe0500040
20	#define L2C_REG_CCTL_M0_ST   0xe0500080
21	#define TOHOST_CMD_REG       0xe0080010
22	
23	#if __riscv_xlen == 64
24	#define TOHOST_CMD(dev, cmd, payload) \
25	  (((uint64_t)(dev) << 56) | ((uint64_t)(cmd) << 48) | (uint64_t)(payload))
26	#define REG_T uint64_t
27	#else
28	#define TOHOST_CMD(dev, cmd, payload) \
29	  ({ \
30	    if ((dev) || (cmd)) \
31	      __builtin_trap(); \
32	    (payload); \
33	  })
34	#define REG_T uint32_t
35	#endif
36	
37	static inline void flush_all_dcache(void)
38	{
39	  // L1 DCache writeback and invalidate all
40	  asm volatile("csrw mcctlcommand, %0" :: "rK"(CCTL_L1D_WBINVAL_ALL));
41	
42	#if __riscv_xlen == 64
43	  // Check for L2 cache and flush it if available
44	  asm volatile(
45	    "csrr    t0, mmsc_cfg\n"
46	    "li      t1, 1\n"
47	    "slli    t1, t1, 46\n"
48	    "and     t2, t0, t1\n"
49	    "beqz    t2, 1f\n"
50	    "li      t3, 0xe0500008\n"
51	    "ld      t4, 0(t3)\n"
52	    "andi    t4, t4, 1\n"
53	    "beqz    t4, 1f\n"
54	    "li      t5, 0xe0500040\n"
55	    "li      t6, %[cmd]\n"
56	    "sd      t6, 0(t5)\n"
57	    "2:\n"
58	    "li      t2, 0xe0500080\n"
59	    "ld      t3, 0(t2)\n"
60	    "li      t4, %[mask]\n"
61	    "and     t3, t3, t4\n"
62	    "li      t5, %[running]\n"
63	    "beq     t3, t5, 2b\n"
64	    "1:\n"
65	    :
66	    : [cmd] "K"(CCTL_L2_WBINVAL_ALL),
67	      [mask] "K"(CCTL_ST_MASK),
68	      [running] "K"(CCTL_L2_ST_RUNNING)
69	  );
70	#endif
71	}
72	
73	__attribute__((used)) static inline void sim_syscall(uint64_t dev,
74	                                                       uint64_t cmd,
75	                                                       uint64_t tohost)
76	{
77	  volatile uint64_t* command = (volatile uint64_t*) TOHOST_CMD_REG;
78	  uint64_t tohost_cmd = TOHOST_CMD(dev, cmd, tohost);
79	  flush_all_dcache();
80	  *command = tohost_cmd;
81	  asm volatile("fence rw,rw");
82	}
83	
84	__attribute__((used)) static inline uint64_t frontend_syscall(uint64_t n,
85	                                                               uint64_t a0,
86	                                                               uint64_t a1,
87	                                                               uint64_t a2,
88	                                                               uint64_t a3,
89	                                                               uint64_t a4,
90	                                                               uint64_t a5,
91	                                                               uint64_t a6)
92	{
93	  volatile uint64_t magicmem[8] = {n, a0, a1, a2, a3, a4, a5, a6};
94	  sim_syscall(0, 0, (uintptr_t) magicmem);
95	  return magicmem[0];
96	}
97	
98	#endif // HTIF_H
99

#ifndef HTIF_H
#define HTIF_H

#include <stddef.h>
#include <stdint.h>

// L1 Cache Control Commands
#define CCTL_L1D_WBINVAL_ALL 6
#define CCTL_L1D_WB_ALL      7
#define CCTL_L1D_INVAL_ALL   23

// L2 Cache Control and Status Constants
#define CCTL_L2_WBINVAL_ALL  0x12
#define CCTL_L2_ST_RUNNING   1
#define CCTL_ST_MASK         0xF

// L2 Cache Control Register Addresses
#define L2C_REG_CTL          0xe0500008
#define L2C_REG_CCTL         0xe0500040
#define L2C_REG_CCTL_M0_ST   0xe0500080
#define TOHOST_CMD_REG       0xe0080010

#if __riscv_xlen == 64
#define TOHOST_CMD(dev, cmd, payload) \
  (((uint64_t)(dev) << 56) | ((uint64_t)(cmd) << 48) | (uint64_t)(payload))
#define REG_T uint64_t
#else
#define TOHOST_CMD(dev, cmd, payload) \
  ({ \
    if ((dev) || (cmd)) \
      __builtin_trap(); \
    (payload); \
  })
#define REG_T uint32_t
#endif

static inline void flush_all_dcache(void)
{
  // L1 DCache writeback and invalidate all
  asm volatile("csrw mcctlcommand, %0" :: "rK"(CCTL_L1D_WBINVAL_ALL));

#if __riscv_xlen == 64
  // Check for L2 cache and flush it if available
  asm volatile(
    "csrr    t0, mmsc_cfg\n"
    "li      t1, 1\n"
    "slli    t1, t1, 46\n"
    "and     t2, t0, t1\n"
    "beqz    t2, 1f\n"
    "li      t3, 0xe0500008\n"
    "ld      t4, 0(t3)\n"
    "andi    t4, t4, 1\n"
    "beqz    t4, 1f\n"
    "li      t5, 0xe0500040\n"
    "li      t6, %[cmd]\n"
    "sd      t6, 0(t5)\n"
    "2:\n"
    "li      t2, 0xe0500080\n"
    "ld      t3, 0(t2)\n"
    "li      t4, %[mask]\n"
    "and     t3, t3, t4\n"
    "li      t5, %[running]\n"
    "beq     t3, t5, 2b\n"
    "1:\n"
    :
    : [cmd] "K"(CCTL_L2_WBINVAL_ALL),
      [mask] "K"(CCTL_ST_MASK),
      [running] "K"(CCTL_L2_ST_RUNNING)
  );
#endif
}

__attribute__((used)) static inline void sim_syscall(uint64_t dev,
                                                       uint64_t cmd,
                                                       uint64_t tohost)
{
  volatile uint64_t* command = (volatile uint64_t*) TOHOST_CMD_REG;
  uint64_t tohost_cmd = TOHOST_CMD(dev, cmd, tohost);
  flush_all_dcache();
  *command = tohost_cmd;
  asm volatile("fence rw,rw");
}

__attribute__((used)) static inline uint64_t frontend_syscall(uint64_t n,
                                                               uint64_t a0,
                                                               uint64_t a1,
                                                               uint64_t a2,
                                                               uint64_t a3,
                                                               uint64_t a4,
                                                               uint64_t a5,
                                                               uint64_t a6)
{
  volatile uint64_t magicmem[8] = {n, a0, a1, a2, a3, a4, a5, a6};
  sim_syscall(0, 0, (uintptr_t) magicmem);
  return magicmem[0];
}

#endif // HTIF_H

#if __riscv_xlen == 64
#define SLL32 sllw
#define STORE sd

1	cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
2	
3	# default to clang, the compiled binary runs faster than gcc after experiment
4	# need to be placed before project(...), because project(...) will decide
5	# which compiler to use
6	set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER clang CACHE STRING "C compiler")
7	set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER clang++ CACHE STRING "C++ compiler")
8	
9	project(vsim LANGUAGES C CXX)
10	
11	# these settings should be placed after project(...) i.e. after
12	# compiler is chosen
13	set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
14	set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
15	set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
16	set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)
17	
18	# ##############################################################################
19	# Options
20	# ##############################################################################
21	option(VSIM_DEBUG "Enable VCD waveform tracing" OFF)
22	option(VSIM_DEBUG_FST "Enable FST waveform tracing (for long recordings)" OFF)
23	option(VSIM_SAVABLE "Enable save/resume simulation (increases build and run time)" OFF)
24	option(VSIM_NO_VERILATOR "Assume verilated modules are already built" OFF)
25	
26	set(VSIM_CONFIG_FILE "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/config.yaml"
27	  CACHE FILEPATH "CPU/platform configuration YAML file")
28	set(VSIM_CCS_OPT ""
29	  CACHE STRING "Extra optimization flags for cpu_cluster_subsystem compilation")
30	set(VSIM_VERILATOR_EXECUTABLE ""
31	  CACHE FILEPATH "Path to verilator executable")
32	set(VSIM_VERILATOR_ROOT ""
33	  CACHE PATH "Verilator source root (auto-detected if empty)")
34	set(VSIM_CPUS ""
35	  CACHE STRING "Semicolon-separated list of CPUs to build (empty = all from config.yaml)")
36	
37	if(VSIM_DEBUG AND VSIM_DEBUG_FST)
38	  message(FATAL_ERROR "VSIM_DEBUG and VSIM_DEBUG_FST are mutually exclusive")
39	endif()
40	
41	# ##############################################################################
42	# Find Python (needed for config parsing)
43	# ##############################################################################
44	find_package(Python3 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Interpreter)
45	
46	# ##############################################################################
47	# Find Verilator
48	# ##############################################################################
49	include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/FindVerilator.cmake)
50	include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/VerilatorHelpers.cmake)
51	
52	# ##############################################################################
53	# Parse config.yaml into cpu_config.cmake
54	# ##############################################################################
55	execute_process(
56	  COMMAND "${Python3_EXECUTABLE}"
57	  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/parse_config_yaml.py"
58	  "${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}"
59	  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.cmake"
60	  RESULT_VARIABLE _parse_result
61	)
62	
63	if(NOT _parse_result EQUAL 0)
64	  message(FATAL_ERROR "Failed to parse ${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}")
65	endif()
66	
67	include("${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.cmake")
68	
69	set_property(DIRECTORY APPEND PROPERTY CMAKE_CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
70	  "${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}"
71	  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/parse_config_yaml.py"
72	)
73	
74	# Filter CPU list if VSIM_CPUS is specified
75	if(VSIM_CPUS)
76	  set(_filtered_cpus "")
77	
78	  foreach(_cpu IN LISTS VSIM_CPUS)
79	    if(_cpu IN_LIST VSIM_CPU_LIST)
80	      list(APPEND _filtered_cpus "${_cpu}")
81	    else()
82	      message(FATAL_ERROR "Unknown CPU '${_cpu}'. Available: ${VSIM_CPU_LIST}")
83	    endif()
84	  endforeach()
85	
86	  set(VSIM_CPU_LIST "${_filtered_cpus}")
87	  message(STATUS "Building CPUs: ${VSIM_CPU_LIST}")
88	else()
89	  message(STATUS "Building all CPUs: ${VSIM_CPU_LIST}")
90	endif()
91	
92	# ##############################################################################
93	# Generate cpu_config.hpp
94	# Uses copy_if_different so dependents are only recompiled when content changes.
95	# ##############################################################################
96	add_custom_command(
97	  OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp"
98	  COMMAND "${Python3_EXECUTABLE}"
99	  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/generate_cpu_config_hpp.py"
100	  "${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}"
101	  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp.tmp"
102	  COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
103	  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp.tmp"
104	  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp"
105	  COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E remove
106	  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp.tmp"
107	  DEPENDS "${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}"
108	  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/generate_cpu_config_hpp.py"
109	  COMMENT "Generating cpu_config.hpp"
110	)
111	
112	# ##############################################################################
113	# Generate version.hpp (rebuild if git HEAD changes)
114	# ##############################################################################
115	set(VSIM_VERSION_OVERRIDE "" CACHE STRING "Override the version string (bypasses git describe; useful for Docker/CI builds)")
116	
117	# Only depend on .git/HEAD if it exists (.git is absent in Docker builds)
118	if(EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.git/HEAD")
119	  set(_git_head_dep "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.git/HEAD")
120	else()
121	  set(_git_head_dep "")
122	endif()
123	
124	add_custom_command(
125	  OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/version.hpp"
126	  COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND}
127	  -DSRC_DIR=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}
128	  -DOUT_FILE=${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/version.hpp
129	  "-DVERSION_OVERRIDE=${VSIM_VERSION_OVERRIDE}"
130	  -P ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/GenerateVersion.cmake
131	  DEPENDS ${_git_head_dep}
132	  COMMENT "Generating version.hpp"
133	)
134	
135	# Single target for both generated headers
136	add_custom_target(generate_headers DEPENDS
137	  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp"
138	  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/version.hpp"
139	)
140	
141	# Compiler / linker flags
142	# ##############################################################################
143	set(VSIM_COMPILE_FLAGS -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -O2 -march=x86-64-v3 -fdiagnostics-color=always)
144	set(VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS SPDLOG_COMPILED_LIB=1 SPDLOG_FMT_EXTERNAL=1 VL_NO_LEGACY=1)
145	set(VSIM_LINK_FLAGS -fuse-ld=lld -lpthread "-Wl,-O1,-z,relro,-z,now,--allow-multiple-definition")
146	set(VSIM_LINK_LIBS atomic dl z)
147	
148	option(VSIM_LINK_STATIC "Link executables statically (for self-contained Docker/scratch images)" OFF)
149	
150	if(VSIM_LINK_STATIC)
151	  list(APPEND VSIM_LINK_FLAGS -static)
152	endif()
153	
154	# Conditional definitions
155	if(VSIM_DEBUG)
156	  list(APPEND VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS VSIMDEBUG)
157	endif()
158	
159	if(VSIM_DEBUG_FST)
160	  list(APPEND VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS VSIMDEBUG TRACEFST)
161	endif()
162	
163	if(VSIM_SAVABLE)
164	  list(APPEND VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS VSIMSAVABLE)
165	endif()
166	
167	# ##############################################################################
168	# External dependencies via ExternalProject_Add
169	# ##############################################################################
170	include(ExternalProject)
171	include(ProcessorCount)
172	ProcessorCount(NPROC)
173	
174	if(NPROC EQUAL 0)
175	  set(NPROC 4)
176	endif()
177	
178	set(DEPS_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/deps")
179	
180	# Imported targets reference install include directories that may not exist yet
181	# in a fresh build tree. Create the expected layout up front so CMake does not
182	# reject the interface include paths during configure.
183	file(MAKE_DIRECTORY
184	  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/include"
185	  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/include"
186	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/include"
187	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/include"
188	  "${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp/include"
189	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/include"
190	  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/include"
191	  "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib"
192	)
193	
194	# -- fmt --
195	ExternalProject_Add(ext_fmt
196	  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/fmt"
197	  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt-build"
198	  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt"
199	  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
200	  CMAKE_ARGS
201	  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
202	  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
203	  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
204	  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
205	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/fmt
206	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
207	  -DFMT_TEST=OFF
208	  -DFMT_DOC=OFF
209	  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/lib/libfmt.a"
210	)
211	
212	# -- spdlog (depends on fmt) --
213	ExternalProject_Add(ext_spdlog
214	  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/spdlog"
215	  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog-build"
216	  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog"
217	  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
218	  CMAKE_ARGS
219	  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
220	  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
221	  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
222	  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
223	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog
224	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
225	  -DSPDLOG_FMT_EXTERNAL=ON
226	  -DSPDLOG_BUILD_TESTS=OFF
227	  -DSPDLOG_BUILD_EXAMPLE=OFF
228	  "-DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/lib/cmake"
229	  DEPENDS ext_fmt
230	  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/lib/libspdlog.a"
231	)
232	
233	# -- systemc --
234	ExternalProject_Add(ext_systemc
235	  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/systemc"
236	  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-build"
237	  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc"
238	  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
239	  CMAKE_ARGS
240	  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
241	  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
242	  -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=20
243	  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
244	  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
245	  -DDISABLE_COPYRIGHT_MESSAGE=ON
246	  -DENABLE_PHASE_CALLBACKS_TRACING=OFF
247	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/systemc
248	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
249	  -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5
250	  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/lib/libsystemc.a"
251	)
252	
253	# -- systemc-cci (depends on systemc, uses autoconf) --
254	ExternalProject_Add(ext_systemc_cci
255	  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/systemc-cci"
256	  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci-build"
257	  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci"
258	  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
259	  CONFIGURE_COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E env
260	  "CPPFLAGS=-DSC_DISABLE_API_VERSION_CHECK=1 -DCCI_HAS_CXX_RVALUE_REFS"
261	  sh -c "cd <BINARY_DIR> && autoreconf --force --install --verbose <SOURCE_DIR> && <SOURCE_DIR>/configure --prefix=<INSTALL_DIR> --with-systemc=${DEPS_DIR}/systemc --with-json=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/rapidjson --enable-static --disable-shared --with-pic --with-layout=unix --with-arch-suffix="
262	  BUILD_COMMAND make -j${NPROC}
263	  INSTALL_COMMAND sh -c "make install && ln -sf cci/cfg <INSTALL_DIR>/include/cci_cfg"
264	  DEPENDS ext_systemc
265	  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/lib/libcci.a"
266	)
267	
268	# -- yaml-cpp --
269	ExternalProject_Add(ext_yaml_cpp
270	  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/yaml-cpp"
271	  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp-build"
272	  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp"
273	  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
274	  CMAKE_ARGS
275	  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
276	  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
277	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp
278	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
279	  -DYAML_CPP_BUILD_TESTS=OFF
280	  -DYAML_CPP_BUILD_TOOLS=OFF
281	  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp/lib/libyaml-cpp.a"
282	)
283	
284	# -- systemc-components (depends on fmt, spdlog, systemc, systemc-cci, yaml-cpp) --
285	# Use CONFIGURE_COMMAND override to set CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH as an env var with ':'
286	# separators. Passing it via CMAKE_ARGS mangles the semicolons.
287	ExternalProject_Add(ext_systemc_components
288	  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/systemc-components"
289	  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components-build"
290	  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components"
291	  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
292	  CONFIGURE_COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E env
293	  "CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp:${DEPS_DIR}/fmt:${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog:${DEPS_DIR}/systemc"
294	  ${CMAKE_COMMAND} <SOURCE_DIR>
295	  -DENABLE_CONAN=0
296	  -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-DSC_DISABLE_API_VERSION_CHECK=1
297	  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
298	  -DBUILD_SCC_LIB_ONLY=ON
299	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components
300	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
301	  DEPENDS ext_fmt ext_spdlog ext_systemc ext_systemc_cci ext_yaml_cpp
302	  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS
303	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libinterfaces.a"
304	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libscc-sysc.a"
305	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libtlm-interfaces.a"
306	)
307	
308	# -- lief --
309	ExternalProject_Add(ext_lief
310	  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/lief"
311	  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/lief-build"
312	  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/lief"
313	  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
314	  CMAKE_ARGS
315	  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
316	  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
317	  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
318	  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
319	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/lief
320	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
321	  -DLIEF_C_API=OFF
322	  -DLIEF_EXAMPLES=OFF
323	  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/lib/libLIEF.a"
324	)
325	
326	# -- andes_clarity (Clarity DB API, bundles SQLite) --
327	ExternalProject_Add(ext_andes_clarity
328	  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/andes_clarity"
329	  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity-build"
330	  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity"
331	  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
332	  CMAKE_ARGS
333	  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
334	  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
335	  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
336	  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
337	  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity
338	  INSTALL_COMMAND sh -c "mkdir -p '${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib' && cp '${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity-build/libdatabase_handler.a' '${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib/'"
339	  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib/libdatabase_handler.a"
340	)
341	
342	# Aggregate dependency target
343	add_custom_target(deps DEPENDS
344	  ext_fmt ext_spdlog ext_systemc ext_systemc_cci
345	  ext_yaml_cpp ext_systemc_components ext_lief ext_andes_clarity
346	)
347	
348	# ##############################################################################
349	# IMPORTED library targets for dependencies
350	# ##############################################################################
351	# Helper macro to create imported static lib
352	macro(vsim_import_lib NAME LOCATION INCLUDE_DIR)
353	  add_library(${NAME} STATIC IMPORTED)
354	  set_target_properties(${NAME} PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION "${LOCATION}")
355	
356	  if(NOT "${INCLUDE_DIR}" STREQUAL "")
357	    set_target_properties(${NAME} PROPERTIES
358	      INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "${INCLUDE_DIR}")
359	  endif()
360	endmacro()
361	
362	vsim_import_lib(lib_database_handler
363	  "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib/libdatabase_handler.a"
364	  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/andes_clarity")
365	
366	vsim_import_lib(lib_fmt
367	  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/lib/libfmt.a"
368	  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/include")
369	
370	vsim_import_lib(lib_spdlog
371	  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/lib/libspdlog.a"
372	  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/include")
373	
374	vsim_import_lib(lib_systemc
375	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/lib/libsystemc.a"
376	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/include")
377	
378	vsim_import_lib(lib_cci
379	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/lib/libcci.a"
380	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/include")
381	
382	vsim_import_lib(lib_lief
383	  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/lib/libLIEF.a"
384	  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/include")
385	
386	vsim_import_lib(lib_interfaces
387	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libinterfaces.a"
388	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/include")
389	
390	vsim_import_lib(lib_scc_sysc
391	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libscc-sysc.a"
392	  "")
393	
394	vsim_import_lib(lib_tlm_interfaces
395	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libtlm-interfaces.a"
396	  "")
397	
398	# Common include directories for all vsim targets
399	set(VSIM_INCLUDE_DIRS
400	  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/include"
401	  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/include"
402	  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/include"
403	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/include"
404	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/include"
405	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/include"
406	  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/andes_clarity"
407	  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/toml11/include"
408	  "${VERILATOR_ROOT}/include"
409	  "${VERILATOR_ROOT}/include/vltstd"
410	)
411	
412	# Ordered list of all dependency archives for linking
413	set(VSIM_DEP_LIBS
414	  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/lib/libfmt.a"
415	  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/lib/libspdlog.a"
416	  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/lib/libLIEF.a"
417	  "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib/libdatabase_handler.a"
418	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/lib/libsystemc.a"
419	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/lib/libcci.a"
420	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libinterfaces.a"
421	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libscc-sysc.a"
422	  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libtlm-interfaces.a"
423	)
424	
425	# ##############################################################################
426	# custom_master object library (compiled once, shared by all CPU targets)
427	# ##############################################################################
428	add_library(custom_master OBJECT EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL src/platform/custom_master.cpp)
429	target_include_directories(custom_master SYSTEM PRIVATE ${VSIM_INCLUDE_DIRS})
430	target_include_directories(custom_master PRIVATE
431	  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}"
432	  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src"
433	)
434	target_compile_options(custom_master PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_FLAGS})
435	target_compile_definitions(custom_master PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS})
436	add_dependencies(custom_master deps generate_headers)
437	
438	# ##############################################################################
439	# Per-CPU targets
440	# ##############################################################################
441	
442	# Wires a per-CPU executable up with the include paths, compile/link options,
443	# verilated CPU library, and aceasim glue. Relies on per-CPU variables set
444	# inside the foreach loop below (CPU_NAME, CPU_UPPER, RTL, OBJ_SC_DIR,
445	# _aceasim_lib, _stub_aceasim_lib).
446	macro(vsim_add_cpu_executable _target _source)
447	  add_executable(${_target} ${ARGN} ${_source})
448	  target_include_directories(${_target} SYSTEM PRIVATE
449	    ${VSIM_INCLUDE_DIRS}
450	    "${OBJ_SC_DIR}"
451	  )
452	  target_include_directories(${_target} PRIVATE
453	    "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}"
454	    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src"
455	    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/hybrid/include"
456	  )
457	  target_compile_options(${_target} PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_FLAGS})
458	  target_compile_definitions(${_target} PRIVATE
459	    ${VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS}
460	    VSIM_CPU_${CPU_UPPER}
461	  )
462	  target_link_options(${_target} PRIVATE ${VSIM_LINK_FLAGS})
463	  target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE
464	    custom_master
465	    "${OBJ_SC_DIR}/V${RTL}__ALL.a"
466	    ${VSIM_DEP_LIBS}
467	    "${OBJ_SC_DIR}/libverilated.a"
468	    ${VSIM_LINK_LIBS}
469	  )
470	  if(_aceasim_lib)
471	    target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE
472	      -Wl,--whole-archive
473	      "${_aceasim_lib}"
474	      -Wl,--no-whole-archive
475	    )
476	  endif()
477	  if(_stub_aceasim_lib)
478	    target_link_options(${_target} PRIVATE
479	      "-Wl,--undefined=get_libaceasim_version")
480	    target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE "${_stub_aceasim_lib}")
481	  endif()
482	  add_dependencies(${_target} deps generate_headers)
483	  if(NOT VSIM_NO_VERILATOR)
484	    add_dependencies(${_target} verilated_${CPU_NAME})
485	  endif()
486	endmacro()
487	
488	foreach(CPU_NAME IN LISTS VSIM_CPU_LIST)
489	  string(TOUPPER "${CPU_NAME}" CPU_UPPER)
490	  string(TOLOWER "${CPU_NAME}" CPU_LOWER)
491	
492	  set(RTL "${VSIM_CPU_${CPU_UPPER}_RTL_PACKAGE}")
493	  set(LIBACEASIM_PATH "${VSIM_CPU_${CPU_UPPER}_LIBACEASIM_PATH}")
494	  set(OBJ_SC_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/V${CPU_NAME}/obj_sc")
495	
496	  # Resolve libaceasim
497	
498	  # _aceasim_lib: user's libaceasim.a generated from COPILOT.
499	  # _stub_aceasim_lib: stubs-built libaceasim.a, always linked to sim_<cpu> when
500	  # given a string.
501	  # The stubs provide all required four DPI-C symbols (ace, ace_pre_dec, vace, vace_dec)
502	  # as defaults in case _aceasim_lib doesn't include any of them. This can happen
503	  # when ACE file only has ACE-Scalar or ACE-RVV instructions, so that COPILOT
504	  # doesn't generate the other types of DPI-C modules.
505	  #
506	  if(LIBACEASIM_PATH AND NOT LIBACEASIM_PATH MATCHES "^stubs")
507	    set(_aceasim_lib "${LIBACEASIM_PATH}")
508	  endif()
509	
510	  if(LIBACEASIM_PATH)
511	    set(_stub_aceasim_lib "${OBJ_SC_DIR}/libaceasim.a")
512	  else()
513	    set(_stub_aceasim_lib "")
514	    set(_aceasim_lib "")
515	  endif()
516	
517	  # Verilator custom commands (unless --no-verilator)
518	  if(NOT VSIM_NO_VERILATOR)
519	    vsim_add_verilated_cpu("${CPU_NAME}")
520	  endif()
521	
522	  vsim_add_cpu_executable(sim_${CPU_NAME} src/main.cpp)
523	  list(APPEND ALL_SIM_TARGETS sim_${CPU_NAME})
524	
525	  if(VSIM_ENABLE_HYBRID)
526	    vsim_add_cpu_executable(dmi_smoke_${CPU_NAME} tests/hybrid/dmi_smoke.cpp
527	                            EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
528	    vsim_add_cpu_executable(handoff_smoke_${CPU_NAME}
529	                            tests/hybrid/handoff_smoke.cpp EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
530	  endif()
531	endforeach()
532	
533	# ##############################################################################
534	# Tests
535	# ##############################################################################
536	enable_testing()
537	
538	function(vsim_add_test TARGET SOURCE)
539	  add_executable(${TARGET} EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL ${SOURCE})
540	  target_include_directories(${TARGET} SYSTEM PRIVATE ${VSIM_INCLUDE_DIRS})
541	  target_include_directories(${TARGET} PRIVATE
542	    "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}"
543	    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src"
544	    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/utils")
545	  target_include_directories(${TARGET} SYSTEM PRIVATE
546	    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/doctest/doctest")
547	  target_compile_options(${TARGET} PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_FLAGS})
548	  target_compile_definitions(${TARGET} PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS})
549	  target_link_options(${TARGET} PRIVATE ${VSIM_LINK_FLAGS})
550	  add_test(NAME ${TARGET} COMMAND $<TARGET_FILE:${TARGET}>)
551	endfunction()
552	
553	vsim_add_test(test_memory_region src/tests/platform/memory_region.test.cpp)
554	vsim_add_test(test_optparse src/tests/utils/optparse.test.cpp)
555	vsim_add_test(test_cpu_signal_registry src/tests/utils/cpu_signal_registry.test.cpp)
556	vsim_add_test(test_sizeconvert src/tests/utils/sizeconvert.test.cpp)
557	vsim_add_test(test_simple_memory src/tests/platform/simple_memory.test.cpp)
558	vsim_add_test(test_mmap_backing src/tests/platform/mmap_backing.test.cpp)
559	vsim_add_test(test_interconnect src/tests/platform/interconnect.test.cpp)
560	vsim_add_test(test_duplicator src/tests/utils/duplicator.test.cpp)
561	vsim_add_test(test_kanata_logger_loopgate
562	  tests/pipeview/kanata_logger_loopgate.test.cpp)
563	target_link_libraries(test_kanata_logger_loopgate PRIVATE
564	  lib_fmt
565	  lib_spdlog
566	  ${VSIM_LINK_LIBS}
567	)
568	add_dependencies(test_kanata_logger_loopgate ext_fmt ext_spdlog)
569	
570	target_link_libraries(test_sizeconvert PRIVATE
571	  lib_fmt
572	  lib_spdlog
573	  lib_systemc
574	  ${VSIM_LINK_LIBS}
575	)
576	add_dependencies(test_sizeconvert ext_fmt ext_spdlog ext_systemc)
577	
578	target_link_libraries(test_simple_memory PRIVATE
579	  lib_fmt
580	  lib_spdlog
581	  lib_systemc
582	  ${VSIM_LINK_LIBS}
583	)
584	add_dependencies(test_simple_memory ext_fmt ext_spdlog ext_systemc)
585	
586	target_link_libraries(test_interconnect PRIVATE
587	  lib_fmt
588	  lib_spdlog
589	  lib_systemc
590	  ${VSIM_LINK_LIBS}
591	)
592	add_dependencies(test_interconnect ext_fmt ext_spdlog ext_systemc)
593	
594	target_link_libraries(test_duplicator PRIVATE
595	  lib_systemc
596	  ${VSIM_LINK_LIBS}
597	)
598	add_dependencies(test_duplicator ext_systemc)
599	
600	add_custom_target(check
601	  COMMAND ${CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND} --output-on-failure
602	  DEPENDS
603	    test_memory_region
604	    test_optparse
605	    test_cpu_signal_registry
606	    test_sizeconvert
607	    test_simple_memory
608	    test_mmap_backing
609	    test_interconnect
610	    test_duplicator
611	  USES_TERMINAL
612	)
613	
614	# ##############################################################################
615	# Hybrid (QEMU + Verilator)
616	# ##############################################################################
617	include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/HybridConfig.cmake)
618	
619	# ##############################################################################

624	)

file.content:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)

# default to clang, the compiled binary runs faster than gcc after experiment
# need to be placed before project(...), because project(...) will decide
# which compiler to use
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER clang CACHE STRING "C compiler")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER clang++ CACHE STRING "C++ compiler")

project(vsim LANGUAGES C CXX)

# these settings should be placed after project(...) i.e. after
# compiler is chosen
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

# ##############################################################################
# Options
# ##############################################################################
option(VSIM_DEBUG "Enable VCD waveform tracing" OFF)
option(VSIM_DEBUG_FST "Enable FST waveform tracing (for long recordings)" OFF)
option(VSIM_SAVABLE "Enable save/resume simulation (increases build and run time)" OFF)
option(VSIM_NO_VERILATOR "Assume verilated modules are already built" OFF)

set(VSIM_CONFIG_FILE "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/config.yaml"
  CACHE FILEPATH "CPU/platform configuration YAML file")
set(VSIM_CCS_OPT ""
  CACHE STRING "Extra optimization flags for cpu_cluster_subsystem compilation")
set(VSIM_VERILATOR_EXECUTABLE ""
  CACHE FILEPATH "Path to verilator executable")
set(VSIM_VERILATOR_ROOT ""
  CACHE PATH "Verilator source root (auto-detected if empty)")
set(VSIM_CPUS ""
  CACHE STRING "Semicolon-separated list of CPUs to build (empty = all from config.yaml)")

if(VSIM_DEBUG AND VSIM_DEBUG_FST)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "VSIM_DEBUG and VSIM_DEBUG_FST are mutually exclusive")
endif()

# ##############################################################################
# Find Python (needed for config parsing)
# ##############################################################################
find_package(Python3 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Interpreter)

# ##############################################################################
# Find Verilator
# ##############################################################################
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/FindVerilator.cmake)
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/VerilatorHelpers.cmake)

# ##############################################################################
# Parse config.yaml into cpu_config.cmake
# ##############################################################################
execute_process(
  COMMAND "${Python3_EXECUTABLE}"
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/parse_config_yaml.py"
  "${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}"
  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.cmake"
  RESULT_VARIABLE _parse_result
)

if(NOT _parse_result EQUAL 0)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "Failed to parse ${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}")
endif()

include("${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.cmake")

set_property(DIRECTORY APPEND PROPERTY CMAKE_CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
  "${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}"
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/parse_config_yaml.py"
)

# Filter CPU list if VSIM_CPUS is specified
if(VSIM_CPUS)
  set(_filtered_cpus "")

  foreach(_cpu IN LISTS VSIM_CPUS)
    if(_cpu IN_LIST VSIM_CPU_LIST)
      list(APPEND _filtered_cpus "${_cpu}")
    else()
      message(FATAL_ERROR "Unknown CPU '${_cpu}'. Available: ${VSIM_CPU_LIST}")
    endif()
  endforeach()

  set(VSIM_CPU_LIST "${_filtered_cpus}")
  message(STATUS "Building CPUs: ${VSIM_CPU_LIST}")
else()
  message(STATUS "Building all CPUs: ${VSIM_CPU_LIST}")
endif()

# ##############################################################################
# Generate cpu_config.hpp
# Uses copy_if_different so dependents are only recompiled when content changes.
# ##############################################################################
add_custom_command(
  OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp"
  COMMAND "${Python3_EXECUTABLE}"
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/generate_cpu_config_hpp.py"
  "${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}"
  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp.tmp"
  COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp.tmp"
  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp"
  COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E remove
  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp.tmp"
  DEPENDS "${VSIM_CONFIG_FILE}"
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/generate_cpu_config_hpp.py"
  COMMENT "Generating cpu_config.hpp"
)

# ##############################################################################
# Generate version.hpp (rebuild if git HEAD changes)
# ##############################################################################
set(VSIM_VERSION_OVERRIDE "" CACHE STRING "Override the version string (bypasses git describe; useful for Docker/CI builds)")

# Only depend on .git/HEAD if it exists (.git is absent in Docker builds)
if(EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.git/HEAD")
  set(_git_head_dep "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.git/HEAD")
else()
  set(_git_head_dep "")
endif()

add_custom_command(
  OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/version.hpp"
  COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND}
  -DSRC_DIR=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}
  -DOUT_FILE=${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/version.hpp
  "-DVERSION_OVERRIDE=${VSIM_VERSION_OVERRIDE}"
  -P ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/GenerateVersion.cmake
  DEPENDS ${_git_head_dep}
  COMMENT "Generating version.hpp"
)

# Single target for both generated headers
add_custom_target(generate_headers DEPENDS
  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cpu_config.hpp"
  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/version.hpp"
)

# Compiler / linker flags
# ##############################################################################
set(VSIM_COMPILE_FLAGS -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -O2 -march=x86-64-v3 -fdiagnostics-color=always)
set(VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS SPDLOG_COMPILED_LIB=1 SPDLOG_FMT_EXTERNAL=1 VL_NO_LEGACY=1)
set(VSIM_LINK_FLAGS -fuse-ld=lld -lpthread "-Wl,-O1,-z,relro,-z,now,--allow-multiple-definition")
set(VSIM_LINK_LIBS atomic dl z)

option(VSIM_LINK_STATIC "Link executables statically (for self-contained Docker/scratch images)" OFF)

if(VSIM_LINK_STATIC)
  list(APPEND VSIM_LINK_FLAGS -static)
endif()

# Conditional definitions
if(VSIM_DEBUG)
  list(APPEND VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS VSIMDEBUG)
endif()

if(VSIM_DEBUG_FST)
  list(APPEND VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS VSIMDEBUG TRACEFST)
endif()

if(VSIM_SAVABLE)
  list(APPEND VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS VSIMSAVABLE)
endif()

# ##############################################################################
# External dependencies via ExternalProject_Add
# ##############################################################################
include(ExternalProject)
include(ProcessorCount)
ProcessorCount(NPROC)

if(NPROC EQUAL 0)
  set(NPROC 4)
endif()

set(DEPS_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/deps")

# Imported targets reference install include directories that may not exist yet
# in a fresh build tree. Create the expected layout up front so CMake does not
# reject the interface include paths during configure.
file(MAKE_DIRECTORY
  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib"
)

# -- fmt --
ExternalProject_Add(ext_fmt
  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/fmt"
  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt-build"
  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt"
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
  CMAKE_ARGS
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/fmt
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
  -DFMT_TEST=OFF
  -DFMT_DOC=OFF
  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/lib/libfmt.a"
)

# -- spdlog (depends on fmt) --
ExternalProject_Add(ext_spdlog
  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/spdlog"
  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog-build"
  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog"
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
  CMAKE_ARGS
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
  -DSPDLOG_FMT_EXTERNAL=ON
  -DSPDLOG_BUILD_TESTS=OFF
  -DSPDLOG_BUILD_EXAMPLE=OFF
  "-DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/lib/cmake"
  DEPENDS ext_fmt
  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/lib/libspdlog.a"
)

# -- systemc --
ExternalProject_Add(ext_systemc
  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/systemc"
  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-build"
  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc"
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
  CMAKE_ARGS
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
  -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=20
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
  -DDISABLE_COPYRIGHT_MESSAGE=ON
  -DENABLE_PHASE_CALLBACKS_TRACING=OFF
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/systemc
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
  -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5
  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/lib/libsystemc.a"
)

# -- systemc-cci (depends on systemc, uses autoconf) --
ExternalProject_Add(ext_systemc_cci
  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/systemc-cci"
  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci-build"
  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci"
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
  CONFIGURE_COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E env
  "CPPFLAGS=-DSC_DISABLE_API_VERSION_CHECK=1 -DCCI_HAS_CXX_RVALUE_REFS"
  sh -c "cd <BINARY_DIR> && autoreconf --force --install --verbose <SOURCE_DIR> && <SOURCE_DIR>/configure --prefix=<INSTALL_DIR> --with-systemc=${DEPS_DIR}/systemc --with-json=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/rapidjson --enable-static --disable-shared --with-pic --with-layout=unix --with-arch-suffix="
  BUILD_COMMAND make -j${NPROC}
  INSTALL_COMMAND sh -c "make install && ln -sf cci/cfg <INSTALL_DIR>/include/cci_cfg"
  DEPENDS ext_systemc
  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/lib/libcci.a"
)

# -- yaml-cpp --
ExternalProject_Add(ext_yaml_cpp
  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/yaml-cpp"
  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp-build"
  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp"
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
  CMAKE_ARGS
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
  -DYAML_CPP_BUILD_TESTS=OFF
  -DYAML_CPP_BUILD_TOOLS=OFF
  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp/lib/libyaml-cpp.a"
)

# -- systemc-components (depends on fmt, spdlog, systemc, systemc-cci, yaml-cpp) --
# Use CONFIGURE_COMMAND override to set CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH as an env var with ':'
# separators. Passing it via CMAKE_ARGS mangles the semicolons.
ExternalProject_Add(ext_systemc_components
  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/systemc-components"
  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components-build"
  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components"
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
  CONFIGURE_COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E env
  "CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=${DEPS_DIR}/yaml-cpp:${DEPS_DIR}/fmt:${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog:${DEPS_DIR}/systemc"
  ${CMAKE_COMMAND} <SOURCE_DIR>
  -DENABLE_CONAN=0
  -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-DSC_DISABLE_API_VERSION_CHECK=1
  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
  -DBUILD_SCC_LIB_ONLY=ON
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
  DEPENDS ext_fmt ext_spdlog ext_systemc ext_systemc_cci ext_yaml_cpp
  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libinterfaces.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libscc-sysc.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libtlm-interfaces.a"
)

# -- lief --
ExternalProject_Add(ext_lief
  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/lief"
  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/lief-build"
  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/lief"
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
  CMAKE_ARGS
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/lief
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib
  -DLIEF_C_API=OFF
  -DLIEF_EXAMPLES=OFF
  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/lib/libLIEF.a"
)

# -- andes_clarity (Clarity DB API, bundles SQLite) --
ExternalProject_Add(ext_andes_clarity
  SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/andes_clarity"
  BINARY_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity-build"
  INSTALL_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity"
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL TRUE
  CMAKE_ARGS
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
  -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity
  INSTALL_COMMAND sh -c "mkdir -p '${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib' && cp '${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity-build/libdatabase_handler.a' '${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib/'"
  BUILD_BYPRODUCTS "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib/libdatabase_handler.a"
)

# Aggregate dependency target
add_custom_target(deps DEPENDS
  ext_fmt ext_spdlog ext_systemc ext_systemc_cci
  ext_yaml_cpp ext_systemc_components ext_lief ext_andes_clarity
)

# ##############################################################################
# IMPORTED library targets for dependencies
# ##############################################################################
# Helper macro to create imported static lib
macro(vsim_import_lib NAME LOCATION INCLUDE_DIR)
  add_library(${NAME} STATIC IMPORTED)
  set_target_properties(${NAME} PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION "${LOCATION}")

  if(NOT "${INCLUDE_DIR}" STREQUAL "")
    set_target_properties(${NAME} PROPERTIES
      INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "${INCLUDE_DIR}")
  endif()
endmacro()

vsim_import_lib(lib_database_handler
  "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib/libdatabase_handler.a"
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/andes_clarity")

vsim_import_lib(lib_fmt
  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/lib/libfmt.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/include")

vsim_import_lib(lib_spdlog
  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/lib/libspdlog.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/include")

vsim_import_lib(lib_systemc
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/lib/libsystemc.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/include")

vsim_import_lib(lib_cci
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/lib/libcci.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/include")

vsim_import_lib(lib_lief
  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/lib/libLIEF.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/include")

vsim_import_lib(lib_interfaces
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libinterfaces.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/include")

vsim_import_lib(lib_scc_sysc
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libscc-sysc.a"
  "")

vsim_import_lib(lib_tlm_interfaces
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libtlm-interfaces.a"
  "")

# Common include directories for all vsim targets
set(VSIM_INCLUDE_DIRS
  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/include"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/include"
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/andes_clarity"
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/toml11/include"
  "${VERILATOR_ROOT}/include"
  "${VERILATOR_ROOT}/include/vltstd"
)

# Ordered list of all dependency archives for linking
set(VSIM_DEP_LIBS
  "${DEPS_DIR}/fmt/lib/libfmt.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/spdlog/lib/libspdlog.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/lief/lib/libLIEF.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/andes_clarity/lib/libdatabase_handler.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc/lib/libsystemc.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-cci/lib/libcci.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libinterfaces.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libscc-sysc.a"
  "${DEPS_DIR}/systemc-components/lib/libtlm-interfaces.a"
)

# ##############################################################################
# custom_master object library (compiled once, shared by all CPU targets)
# ##############################################################################
add_library(custom_master OBJECT EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL src/platform/custom_master.cpp)
target_include_directories(custom_master SYSTEM PRIVATE ${VSIM_INCLUDE_DIRS})
target_include_directories(custom_master PRIVATE
  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}"
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src"
)
target_compile_options(custom_master PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_FLAGS})
target_compile_definitions(custom_master PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS})
add_dependencies(custom_master deps generate_headers)

# ##############################################################################
# Per-CPU targets
# ##############################################################################

# Wires a per-CPU executable up with the include paths, compile/link options,
# verilated CPU library, and aceasim glue. Relies on per-CPU variables set
# inside the foreach loop below (CPU_NAME, CPU_UPPER, RTL, OBJ_SC_DIR,
# _aceasim_lib, _stub_aceasim_lib).
macro(vsim_add_cpu_executable _target _source)
  add_executable(${_target} ${ARGN} ${_source})
  target_include_directories(${_target} SYSTEM PRIVATE
    ${VSIM_INCLUDE_DIRS}
    "${OBJ_SC_DIR}"
  )
  target_include_directories(${_target} PRIVATE
    "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}"
    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src"
    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/hybrid/include"
  )
  target_compile_options(${_target} PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_FLAGS})
  target_compile_definitions(${_target} PRIVATE
    ${VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS}
    VSIM_CPU_${CPU_UPPER}
  )
  target_link_options(${_target} PRIVATE ${VSIM_LINK_FLAGS})
  target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE
    custom_master
    "${OBJ_SC_DIR}/V${RTL}__ALL.a"
    ${VSIM_DEP_LIBS}
    "${OBJ_SC_DIR}/libverilated.a"
    ${VSIM_LINK_LIBS}
  )
  if(_aceasim_lib)
    target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE
      -Wl,--whole-archive
      "${_aceasim_lib}"
      -Wl,--no-whole-archive
    )
  endif()
  if(_stub_aceasim_lib)
    target_link_options(${_target} PRIVATE
      "-Wl,--undefined=get_libaceasim_version")
    target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE "${_stub_aceasim_lib}")
  endif()
  add_dependencies(${_target} deps generate_headers)
  if(NOT VSIM_NO_VERILATOR)
    add_dependencies(${_target} verilated_${CPU_NAME})
  endif()
endmacro()

foreach(CPU_NAME IN LISTS VSIM_CPU_LIST)
  string(TOUPPER "${CPU_NAME}" CPU_UPPER)
  string(TOLOWER "${CPU_NAME}" CPU_LOWER)

  set(RTL "${VSIM_CPU_${CPU_UPPER}_RTL_PACKAGE}")
  set(LIBACEASIM_PATH "${VSIM_CPU_${CPU_UPPER}_LIBACEASIM_PATH}")
  set(OBJ_SC_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/V${CPU_NAME}/obj_sc")

  # Resolve libaceasim

  # _aceasim_lib: user's libaceasim.a generated from COPILOT.
  # _stub_aceasim_lib: stubs-built libaceasim.a, always linked to sim_<cpu> when
  # given a string.
  # The stubs provide all required four DPI-C symbols (ace, ace_pre_dec, vace, vace_dec)
  # as defaults in case _aceasim_lib doesn't include any of them. This can happen
  # when ACE file only has ACE-Scalar or ACE-RVV instructions, so that COPILOT
  # doesn't generate the other types of DPI-C modules.
  #
  if(LIBACEASIM_PATH AND NOT LIBACEASIM_PATH MATCHES "^stubs")
    set(_aceasim_lib "${LIBACEASIM_PATH}")
  endif()

  if(LIBACEASIM_PATH)
    set(_stub_aceasim_lib "${OBJ_SC_DIR}/libaceasim.a")
  else()
    set(_stub_aceasim_lib "")
    set(_aceasim_lib "")
  endif()

  # Verilator custom commands (unless --no-verilator)
  if(NOT VSIM_NO_VERILATOR)
    vsim_add_verilated_cpu("${CPU_NAME}")
  endif()

  vsim_add_cpu_executable(sim_${CPU_NAME} src/main.cpp)
  list(APPEND ALL_SIM_TARGETS sim_${CPU_NAME})

  if(VSIM_ENABLE_HYBRID)
    vsim_add_cpu_executable(dmi_smoke_${CPU_NAME} tests/hybrid/dmi_smoke.cpp
                            EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
    vsim_add_cpu_executable(handoff_smoke_${CPU_NAME}
                            tests/hybrid/handoff_smoke.cpp EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
  endif()
endforeach()

# ##############################################################################
# Tests
# ##############################################################################
enable_testing()

function(vsim_add_test TARGET SOURCE)
  add_executable(${TARGET} EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL ${SOURCE})
  target_include_directories(${TARGET} SYSTEM PRIVATE ${VSIM_INCLUDE_DIRS})
  target_include_directories(${TARGET} PRIVATE
    "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}"
    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src"
    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/utils")
  target_include_directories(${TARGET} SYSTEM PRIVATE
    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/doctest/doctest")
  target_compile_options(${TARGET} PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_FLAGS})
  target_compile_definitions(${TARGET} PRIVATE ${VSIM_COMPILE_DEFS})
  target_link_options(${TARGET} PRIVATE ${VSIM_LINK_FLAGS})
  add_test(NAME ${TARGET} COMMAND $<TARGET_FILE:${TARGET}>)
endfunction()

vsim_add_test(test_memory_region src/tests/platform/memory_region.test.cpp)

add_custom_target(check

add_dependencies(check test_gdbstub_client)

vsim_add_test(test_handoff_controller tests/hybrid/handoff_controller.test.cpp)
target_include_directories(test_handoff_controller PRIVATE
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/hybrid/include"
)
add_dependencies(check test_handoff_controller)

if(VSIM_ENABLE_HYBRID)
  if(NOT EXISTS "${VSIM_QEMU_ROOT}/include/qemu/qemu-plugin.h")
    message(WARNING
      "VSIM_ENABLE_HYBRID=ON but qemu-plugin.h not found under "
      "${VSIM_QEMU_ROOT}/include/qemu/. Build the TCG plugin out-of-tree via "
      "hybrid/qemu_plugin/Makefile on a host that has QEMU installed.")
  endif()
  message(STATUS "Hybrid mode: enabled (QEMU root: ${VSIM_QEMU_ROOT})")

  # Round-trip e2e tests. Each entry registers one CTest case using the
  # parameterized roundtrip_e2e.sh harness. The harness skips (return 77)
  # when QEMU/plugin/ELF artifacts are missing, so the same CTestTestfile
  # works whether ctest is invoked from the container's /work/build or
  # from the host's build/.
  set(VSIM_RT_FIXTURES
    "handoff_roundtrip:3"
    "rt_pc_jump:0"
    "rt_sign_bits:0"
    "rt_abi_aliases:0"
    "rt_long_roi:0"
    "rt_all_gprs:0"
    "rt_mem_loadstore:0"
    "rt_unaligned_lh:0"
    "rt_csr_survival:0"
  )
  foreach(entry ${VSIM_RT_FIXTURES})
    string(REPLACE ":" ";" parts ${entry})
    list(GET parts 0 fname)
    list(GET parts 1 erc)
    add_test(
      NAME test_e2e_${fname}
      COMMAND bash -c
        "FIXTURE=${fname} EXPECT_RC=${erc} bash ../tests/hybrid/roundtrip_e2e.sh"
    )
    set_tests_properties(test_e2e_${fname} PROPERTIES
      SKIP_RETURN_CODE 77
      LABELS "hybrid-e2e"
    )
  endforeach()

  # Tier-2: separate driver because it allocates /dev/shm and uses
  # --shared-mem-path / -object memory-backend-file to share RAM across
  # QEMU 1, vsim, and QEMU 2.
  add_test(NAME test_e2e_rt_shared_mem
    COMMAND bash ../tests/hybrid/rt_shared_mem.sh)
  set_tests_properties(test_e2e_rt_shared_mem PROPERTIES
    SKIP_RETURN_CODE 77
    LABELS "hybrid-e2e"
  )

  # Negative / robustness drivers: each guards a quietly-degrading failure
  # path the happy-path round-trips can't see (corrupted state file,
  # missing --qemu-binary, silent gdbstub peer).
  foreach(neg corrupt_state no_qemu_binary gdbstub_timeout)
    add_test(NAME test_e2e_rt_${neg}
      COMMAND bash ../tests/hybrid/rt_${neg}.sh)
    set_tests_properties(test_e2e_rt_${neg} PROPERTIES
      SKIP_RETURN_CODE 77
      LABELS "hybrid-e2e"
    )
  endforeach()
endif()

content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	# End-to-end roundtrip:
3	#   1. QEMU 1 + plugin: drains state at `csrwi 0x7C0, 0`.
4	#   2. vsim: resumes, runs body, drains at `csrwi 0x7C0, 1`, exits 200.
5	#   3. vsim's --qemu-binary path: spawns QEMU 2 with -gdb -S -semihosting,
6	#      restores GPRs+PC via gdbstub, continues.
7	#   4. QEMU 2 hits the RISC-V semihosting ebreak-triple, exits with the
8	#      semihosting exit_code (low 8 bits of a2 in the existing fixture).
9	#
10	# Fixture-parameterized:
11	#   FIXTURE     name of .elf under hybrid/test/  (default: handoff_roundtrip)
12	#   EXPECT_RC   expected vsim process exit code  (default: 3)
13	#
14	# Required environment:
15	#   VSIM_BIN         path to sim_<cpu> binary (host-runnable)
16	#   VSIM_QEMU        path to qemu-system-riscv64
17	#   VSIM_PLUGIN      path to libhybrid_handoff.so
18	#   VSIM_ELF         path to <fixture>.elf  (overrides FIXTURE if set)
19	
20	set -euo pipefail
21	
22	SCRIPT_DIR=$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)
23	REPO_ROOT=$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)
24	
25	FIXTURE="${FIXTURE:-handoff_roundtrip}"
26	EXPECT_RC="${EXPECT_RC:-3}"
27	
28	VSIM_BIN="${VSIM_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/build/sim_ax45mpv_premium}"
29	VSIM_QEMU="${VSIM_QEMU:-/local/nick/qemu_v5/build/qemu-system-riscv64}"
30	VSIM_PLUGIN="${VSIM_PLUGIN:-$REPO_ROOT/hybrid/qemu_plugin/libhybrid_handoff.so}"
31	VSIM_ELF="${VSIM_ELF:-$REPO_ROOT/hybrid/test/${FIXTURE}.elf}"
32	
33	for f in "$VSIM_BIN" "$VSIM_QEMU" "$VSIM_PLUGIN" "$VSIM_ELF"; do
34	  if [ ! -e "$f" ]; then
35	    echo "skip: $f not built; run 'make' under hybrid/test and hybrid/qemu_plugin"
36	    exit 77   # CTest skip code when SKIP_RETURN_CODE is set
37	  fi
38	done
39	
40	STATE_QEMU=$(mktemp)
41	STATE_VSIM=$(mktemp)
42	SIM_LOG=$(mktemp)
43	trap 'rm -f "$STATE_QEMU" "$STATE_VSIM" "$SIM_LOG"' EXIT
44	
45	echo "[$FIXTURE 1/3] QEMU 1: drain entry state -> $STATE_QEMU"
46	"$VSIM_QEMU" -M virt -bios none -nographic \
47	  -kernel "$VSIM_ELF" \
48	  -plugin "$VSIM_PLUGIN,outfile=$STATE_QEMU" >/dev/null 2>&1
49	
50	if [ ! -s "$STATE_QEMU" ]; then
51	  echo "FAIL[$FIXTURE]: QEMU 1 did not produce state"
52	  exit 1
53	fi
54	
55	echo "[$FIXTURE 2/3] vsim: resume + drain + spawn QEMU 2"
56	set +e
57	timeout 60 "$VSIM_BIN" "$VSIM_ELF" \
58	  --resume-from-qemu "$STATE_QEMU" \
59	  --handoff-out "$STATE_VSIM" \
60	  --qemu-binary "$VSIM_QEMU" >"$SIM_LOG" 2>&1
61	RC=$?
62	set -e
63	
64	if [ "$RC" != "$EXPECT_RC" ]; then
65	  echo "FAIL[$FIXTURE]: expected exit $EXPECT_RC, got $RC"
66	  echo "--- sim log ---"
67	  cat "$SIM_LOG"
68	  exit 1
69	fi
70	
71	echo "[$FIXTURE 3/3] PASS: round-trip exit code $RC"
72

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# End-to-end roundtrip:
#   1. QEMU 1 + plugin: drains state at `csrwi 0x7C0, 0`.
#   2. vsim: resumes, runs body, drains at `csrwi 0x7C0, 1`, exits 200.
#   3. vsim's --qemu-binary path: spawns QEMU 2 with -gdb -S -semihosting,
#      restores GPRs+PC via gdbstub, continues.
#   4. QEMU 2 hits the RISC-V semihosting ebreak-triple, exits with the
#      semihosting exit_code (low 8 bits of a2 in the existing fixture).
#
# Fixture-parameterized:
#   FIXTURE     name of .elf under hybrid/test/  (default: handoff_roundtrip)
#   EXPECT_RC   expected vsim process exit code  (default: 3)
#
# Required environment:
#   VSIM_BIN         path to sim_<cpu> binary (host-runnable)
#   VSIM_QEMU        path to qemu-system-riscv64
#   VSIM_PLUGIN      path to libhybrid_handoff.so
#   VSIM_ELF         path to <fixture>.elf  (overrides FIXTURE if set)

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR=$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)
REPO_ROOT=$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)

FIXTURE="${FIXTURE:-handoff_roundtrip}"
EXPECT_RC="${EXPECT_RC:-3}"

VSIM_BIN="${VSIM_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/build/sim_ax45mpv_premium}"
VSIM_QEMU="${VSIM_QEMU:-/local/nick/qemu_v5/build/qemu-system-riscv64}"
VSIM_PLUGIN="${VSIM_PLUGIN:-$REPO_ROOT/hybrid/qemu_plugin/libhybrid_handoff.so}"
VSIM_ELF="${VSIM_ELF:-$REPO_ROOT/hybrid/test/${FIXTURE}.elf}"

for f in "$VSIM_BIN" "$VSIM_QEMU" "$VSIM_PLUGIN" "$VSIM_ELF"; do
  if [ ! -e "$f" ]; then
    echo "skip: $f not built; run 'make' under hybrid/test and hybrid/qemu_plugin"
    exit 77   # CTest skip code when SKIP_RETURN_CODE is set
  fi
done

STATE_QEMU=$(mktemp)
STATE_VSIM=$(mktemp)
SIM_LOG=$(mktemp)
trap 'rm -f "$STATE_QEMU" "$STATE_VSIM" "$SIM_LOG"' EXIT

echo "[$FIXTURE 1/3] QEMU 1: drain entry state -> $STATE_QEMU"
"$VSIM_QEMU" -M virt -bios none -nographic \
  -kernel "$VSIM_ELF" \
  -plugin "$VSIM_PLUGIN,outfile=$STATE_QEMU" >/dev/null 2>&1

if [ ! -s "$STATE_QEMU" ]; then
  echo "FAIL[$FIXTURE]: QEMU 1 did not produce state"
  exit 1
fi

echo "[$FIXTURE 2/3] vsim: resume + drain + spawn QEMU 2"
set +e
timeout 60 "$VSIM_BIN" "$VSIM_ELF" \
  --resume-from-qemu "$STATE_QEMU" \
  --handoff-out "$STATE_VSIM" \
  --qemu-binary "$VSIM_QEMU" >"$SIM_LOG" 2>&1
RC=$?
set -e

if [ "$RC" != "$EXPECT_RC" ]; then
  echo "FAIL[$FIXTURE]: expected exit $EXPECT_RC, got $RC"
  echo "--- sim log ---"
  cat "$SIM_LOG"
  exit 1
fi

echo "[$FIXTURE 3/3] PASS: round-trip exit code $RC"

# Build tiny RV64 fixtures used by hybrid smoke tests.
# Default toolchain matches /local/nick/SW_Release/build-ast540/...

TOOLCHAIN ?= /local/nick/SW_Release/build-ast540/build-toolchain/linux/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d
CC        := $(TOOLCHAIN)/bin/riscv64-unknown-elf-gcc
LD        := $(TOOLCHAIN)/bin/riscv64-unknown-elf-ld
OBJDUMP   := $(TOOLCHAIN)/bin/riscv64-unknown-elf-objdump

CFLAGS  := -march=rv64gc -mabi=lp64d -nostdlib -static -Wall
LDFLAGS := -T spin.ld -nostdlib -static

# Tier-1 round-trip e2e fixtures share handoff_roundtrip.ld.
RT_FIXTURES := rt_all_gprs rt_abi_aliases rt_sign_bits rt_pc_jump \
               rt_long_roi rt_mem_loadstore rt_unaligned_lh \
               rt_shared_mem rt_csr_survival

.PHONY: all clean dump

all: spin.elf handoff.elf handoff_exit.elf handoff_roundtrip.elf \
     $(RT_FIXTURES:%=%.elf)

spin.elf: spin.S spin.ld
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c spin.S -o spin.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) spin.o -o $@

handoff.elf: handoff.S handoff.ld
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c handoff.S -o handoff.o
	$(LD) -T handoff.ld -nostdlib -static handoff.o -o $@

handoff_exit.elf: handoff_exit.S handoff_exit.ld
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c handoff_exit.S -o handoff_exit.o
	$(LD) -T handoff_exit.ld -nostdlib -static handoff_exit.o -o $@

handoff_roundtrip.elf: handoff_roundtrip.S handoff_roundtrip.ld semihost_exit.inc
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c handoff_roundtrip.S -o handoff_roundtrip.o
	$(LD) -T handoff_roundtrip.ld -nostdlib -static handoff_roundtrip.o -o $@

$(RT_FIXTURES:%=%.elf): %.elf: %.S handoff_roundtrip.ld semihost_exit.inc
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c $< -o $*.o
	$(LD) -T handoff_roundtrip.ld -nostdlib -static $*.o -o $@

dump: spin.elf handoff.elf handoff_exit.elf
	$(OBJDUMP) -d spin.elf
	$(OBJDUMP) -d handoff.elf
	$(OBJDUMP) -d handoff_exit.elf

clean:
	rm -f spin.o spin.elf handoff.o handoff.elf handoff_exit.o handoff_exit.elf \
	      handoff_roundtrip.o handoff_roundtrip.elf \
	      $(RT_FIXTURES:%=%.o) $(RT_FIXTURES:%=%.elf)

1	// rt_all_gprs.S
2	//
3	// Tier-1 fixture: full sweep of x1..x31 across QEMU1 -> vsim -> QEMU2.
4	// Each register survives the round-trip with its 64-bit value intact.
5	//
6	// Phase A (QEMU1):
7	//   x5 = 0x80002000 (also serves as Phase C spill base).
8	//   x_i = 0xA000_0000_0000_0000 + i for i in {1..4, 6..31}.
9	// Phase B (vsim):  no-op.
10	// Phase C (QEMU2):
11	//   Spill x6, x28, x29 (sacrificed below).
12	//   Verify x_i directly for i in {1..4, 7..27, 30..31, then 5}.
13	//   Verify spilled x6, x28, x29 against expected.
14	//   Exit code = first mismatching reg num, or 0 on full pass.
15	
16	#include "semihost_exit.inc"
17	
18	.section .text
19	.globl _start
20	_start:
21	    li      x6, 0xA000000000000000   // temp base for ADDI sweep
22	    addi    x1,  x6, 1
23	    addi    x2,  x6, 2
24	    addi    x3,  x6, 3
25	    addi    x4,  x6, 4
26	    addi    x7,  x6, 7

34	    addi    x15, x6, 15
35	    addi    x16, x6, 16
36	    addi    x17, x6, 17
37	    addi    x18, x6, 18
38	    addi    x19, x6, 19
39	    addi    x20, x6, 20
40	    addi    x21, x6, 21
41	    addi    x22, x6, 22
42	    addi    x23, x6, 23
43	    addi    x24, x6, 24
44	    addi    x25, x6, 25
45	    addi    x26, x6, 26
46	    addi    x27, x6, 27
47	    addi    x28, x6, 28
48	    addi    x29, x6, 29
49	    addi    x30, x6, 30
50	    addi    x31, x6, 31
51	    addi    x6,  x6, 6               // x6 = 0xA000_..._6
52	    li      x5, 0x80002000           // x5 = spill base (also its expected value)
53	
54	    csrwi   0x7C0, 0                 // QEMU1 drains, exits
55	
56	    csrwi   0x7C0, 1                 // vsim drains, exits 200

59	    // Spill x6, x28, x29 to 0x80002000, +8, +16 before corrupting them.
60	    sd      x6,  0(x5)
61	    sd      x28, 8(x5)
62	    sd      x29, 16(x5)
63	
64	    li      x6,  0xA000000000000000  // verification base
65	    li      x29, 0                   // result reg (0 = pass)
66	
67	    .macro CHECK_BASE n
68	        bnez    x29, 99f
69	        addi    x28, x6, \n
70	        beq     x\n, x28, 99f
71	        addi    x29, x0, \n
72	    99:
73	    .endm
74	
75	    CHECK_BASE 1
76	    CHECK_BASE 2
77	    CHECK_BASE 3
78	    CHECK_BASE 4
79	    CHECK_BASE 7
80	    CHECK_BASE 8
81	    CHECK_BASE 9

99	    CHECK_BASE 27

101	    CHECK_BASE 31

103	    // Verify x5 directly (still holds 0x80002000).
104	    bnez    x29, check_spilled
105	    li      x28, 0x80002000
106	    beq     x5, x28, check_spilled
107	    addi    x29, x0, 5
108	
109	check_spilled:
110	    // Verify spilled x6 (expected = 0xA000_..._6).
111	    bnez    x29, check_x28
112	    ld      x28, 0(x5)
113	    li      x6, 0xA000000000000000
114	    addi    x6, x6, 6
115	    beq     x28, x6, check_x28
116	    addi    x29, x0, 6
117
